headline: The White House reversed its two-week restriction on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models, lifting export controls on the company's frontier systems.
body: The most salient shift is regulatory: the White House dropped restrictions and export controls on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models after a two-week ban, with access to Fable set to restore July 1. On the model side, Sonnet 5 landed to critical reviews, with one test finding it underperforms Opus and GLM-5.2 while costing more, alongside reports of an upcoming Fable 5. Model Context Protocol continues to gain ground as the connective layer for agents, shown in Google Cloud's FynanceAI platform orchestrating across Oracle databases, Looker BI, and vector stores. Tooling concepts broke out this window, with continuous monitoring, profiling, reproducibility, and sampling evaluation leading the rotation.
